security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data can be modified in transit without detection.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not protect vote data from modification during transmission.

assumptions: The communication channel between the user and the governance contract is insecure.
The system lacks mechanisms to detect or prevent data manipulation.

mitigation.strategy: Use HTTPS/TLS encryption for all communication channels and implement data integrity checks.

description: An attacker may intercept and alter vote data before it reaches the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: The system lacks audit logs and accountability mechanisms for votes.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not provide sufficient auditability to trace votes back to users.

assumptions: The governance contract does not record the source IP address or other identifying information of voters.
There are no mechanisms to establish non-repudiation of votes.

mitigation.strategy: Implement thorough audit logging, including voter identity and timestamp for each vote.

description: An attacker may cast a vote and deny their participation, making it difficult to hold them accountable.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data may be leaked during transmission or stored insecurely.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not adequately protect vote data from unauthorized disclosure.

assumptions: Vote data is transmitted over an insecure network.
The database storing vote data is not properly secured.

mitigation.strategy: Encrypt vote data both in transit and at rest. Implement access controls to restrict access to vote data.

description: An attacker may gain access to confidential vote data.
